ssj-goku.name: SSj Goku
ssj-goku.archetype: Aggressive all-rounder with strong neutral angles, high damage routes, and flexible assists.
ssj-goku.overview: Aggressive all-rounder with strong neutral angles, high damage routes, and flexible assists.
strengths: Great beam and angled projectile control.
High combo damage with practical routes.
weaknesses: Mix is solid but not naturally oppressive.
Some pressure relies on readable left-right or Dragon Fist layers.

goku-blue.name: Goku Blue
goku-blue.archetype: High-skill point character with strong mobility, command grab pressure, and powerful corner routes.
goku-blue.overview: High-skill point character with strong mobility, command grab pressure, and powerful corner routes.
strengths: Strong level 3 mix and corner damage.
weaknesses: Can overcommit if movement is not covered.

base-goku.name: Base Goku
base-goku.archetype: Explosive support/anchor with elite command grabs, Spirit Bomb value, and terrifying limit-break damage.
base-goku.overview: Explosive support/anchor with elite command grabs, Spirit Bomb value, and terrifying limit-break damage.
strengths: Huge solo damage and meter dump value.
weaknesses: Needs routing knowledge for best Spirit Bomb setups.

gt-goku.name: GT Goku
gt-goku.archetype: Small, mobile support with strong assist utility, tricky movement, and Spirit Bomb cashout.
gt-goku.overview: Small, mobile support with strong assist utility, tricky movement, and Spirit Bomb cashout.
weaknesses: Needs clean movement and setup timing.

ui-goku.name: UI Goku
ui-goku.archetype: Defensive counter-poke character with strong neutral control, reversals, and dangerous level 3 pressure.
ui-goku.overview: Defensive counter-poke character with strong neutral control, reversals, and dangerous level 3 pressure.
weaknesses: Some options are punishable when predictable.

bardock.name: Bardock
bardock.archetype: Straightforward rushdown fighter with fast lariats, strong pressure rhythm, and reliable team fit.
bardock.overview: Straightforward rushdown fighter with fast lariats, strong pressure rhythm, and reliable team fit.
weaknesses: Can be linear without assist cover.

goku-black.name: Goku Black
goku-black.archetype: Clean neutral character with beam control, teleport layers, and easy team integration.
goku-black.overview: Clean neutral character with beam control, teleport layers, and easy team integration.
weaknesses: Mix is not his biggest strength.

zamasu.name: Zamasu
zamasu.archetype: Technical setplay character with flight movement, strong oki concepts, and unique tag/super routes.
zamasu.overview: Technical setplay character with flight movement, strong oki concepts, and unique tag/super routes.
weaknesses: Can struggle if denied setup time.

ssj-vegeta.name: SSj Vegeta
ssj-vegeta.archetype: Classic support Vegeta with strong assist value, clean neutral, and simple pressure tools.
ssj-vegeta.overview: Classic support Vegeta with strong assist value, clean neutral, and simple pressure tools.
strengths: Good ki blast and neutral checks.
weaknesses: Damage is not the main selling point.

vegeta-blue.name: Vegeta Blue
vegeta-blue.archetype: Explosive point character with rekka pressure, strong corner carry, and scary assist-backed mix.
vegeta-blue.overview: Explosive point character with rekka pressure, strong corner carry, and scary assist-backed mix.
weaknesses: Can overextend if pressure is challenged.

base-vegeta.name: Base Vegeta
base-vegeta.archetype: High-ceiling point with oppressive corner loops, strong oki, and excellent damage when mastered.
base-vegeta.overview: High-ceiling point with oppressive corner loops, strong oki, and excellent damage when mastered.

super-baby-2.name: Super Baby 2
super-baby-2.archetype: Screen-control specialist with strong projectiles, stolen-assist pressure, and excellent team utility.
super-baby-2.overview: Screen-control specialist with strong projectiles, stolen-assist pressure, and excellent team utility.
weaknesses: Can be rushed if patterns are predictable.

vegito-blue.name: Vegito Blue
vegito-blue.archetype: Dominant neutral bully with huge buttons, strong confirms, and high team flexibility.
vegito-blue.overview: Dominant neutral bully with huge buttons, strong confirms, and high team flexibility.

gogeta-blue.name: Gogeta Blue
gogeta-blue.archetype: Explosive point/pivot with strong normals, huge damage routes, and high reward from assists.
gogeta-blue.overview: Explosive point/pivot with strong normals, huge damage routes, and high reward from assists.
weaknesses: Needs help to make offense airtight.

ssj4-gogeta.name: SSj4 Gogeta
ssj4-gogeta.archetype: Momentum monster with scary pressure, Dragon Ball threat, and strong assist-backed mix.
ssj4-gogeta.overview: Momentum monster with scary pressure, Dragon Ball threat, and strong assist-backed mix.
weaknesses: Can need assist help in neutral.

teen-gohan.name: Teen Gohan
teen-gohan.archetype: Fast pressure character with dangerous staggers, strong damage, and scary assist-backed offense.
teen-gohan.overview: Fast pressure character with dangerous staggers, strong damage, and scary assist-backed offense.

adult-gohan.name: Adult Gohan
adult-gohan.archetype: Level-up character who becomes more dangerous as resources and momentum build.
adult-gohan.overview: Level-up character who becomes more dangerous as resources and momentum build.

videl.name: Videl
videl.archetype: Mobile pressure character with evasive movement, layered offense, and tricky assist synergy.
videl.overview: Mobile pressure character with evasive movement, layered offense, and tricky assist synergy.

gotenks.name: Gotenks
gotenks.archetype: Ghost oki specialist with layered pressure, strong blockstun assists, and deep combo/setplay routes.
gotenks.overview: Ghost oki specialist with layered pressure, strong blockstun assists, and deep combo/setplay routes.

trunks.name: Trunks
trunks.archetype: Stylish neutral/mobility character with flips, strong pokes, and creative left-right pressure.
trunks.overview: Stylish neutral/mobility character with flips, strong pokes, and creative left-right pressure.
weaknesses: Needs precision to make mix tight.

piccolo.name: Piccolo
piccolo.archetype: Orb/setplay character with strong screen control, layered pressure, and unique assist value.
piccolo.overview: Orb/setplay character with strong screen control, layered pressure, and unique assist value.
weaknesses: Can be awkward without setup time.

krillin.name: Krillin
krillin.archetype: Utility support with rocks, Senzu, tricky pressure, and strong team-specific routes.
krillin.overview: Utility support with rocks, Senzu, tricky pressure, and strong team-specific routes.

yamcha.name: Yamcha
yamcha.archetype: Close-range pressure support with strong assist value and fast scramble offense.
yamcha.overview: Close-range pressure support with strong assist value and fast scramble offense.
weaknesses: Can struggle to force neutral alone.

tien.name: Tien
tien.archetype: High-damage support/anchor with strong supers, solid assists, and excellent cashout.
tien.overview: High-damage support/anchor with strong supers, solid assists, and excellent cashout.
weaknesses: Neutral is solid rather than dominant.

master-roshi.name: Master Roshi
master-roshi.archetype: Technical movement character with unique mobility, strong assists, and creative pressure.
master-roshi.overview: Technical movement character with unique mobility, strong assists, and creative pressure.
weaknesses: No normal super dash changes routing.

frieza.name: Frieza
frieza.archetype: Screen-control zoner who becomes a fast mix threat once Golden Frieza is online.
frieza.overview: Screen-control zoner who becomes a fast mix threat once Golden Frieza is online.
strengths: Controls many screen angles with fast 5S, discs, orbs, pillars, lasers, and long normals.
Golden Frieza gives speed, double air dash pressure, reverse beat, and stronger confirms.
Self-sufficient combos, strong space traps, and good universal mix because 2L hits low.
weaknesses: Golden is once per match and timer-based.
A and B assists are awkward or low blockstun.

cooler.name: Cooler
cooler.archetype: Anti-zoning bruiser with huge normals, strong defensive tools, and high super damage.
cooler.overview: Anti-zoning bruiser with huge normals, strong defensive tools, and high super damage.
weaknesses: Some pressure gaps can be challenged.

nappa.name: Nappa
nappa.archetype: Saibamen setplay character with terrifying restands and some of the strongest advantage states.
nappa.overview: Saibamen setplay character with terrifying restands and some of the strongest advantage states.

ginyu.name: Ginyu
ginyu.archetype: Summon-heavy character who controls tempo with Ginyu Force calls and unique body-swap threat.
ginyu.overview: Summon-heavy character who controls tempo with Ginyu Force calls and unique body-swap threat.

cell.name: Cell
cell.archetype: Classic all-rounder with strong buttons, movement, pressure, and flexible team placement.
cell.overview: Classic all-rounder with strong buttons, movement, pressure, and flexible team placement.
weaknesses: Needs team help to become truly oppressive.

majin-buu.name: Majin Buu
majin-buu.archetype: Fat toss setplay character with strong restands, unusual pressure, and high team-specific reward.
majin-buu.overview: Fat toss setplay character with strong restands, unusual pressure, and high team-specific reward.
strengths: High payoff with the right assists.

kid-buu.name: Kid Buu
kid-buu.archetype: Elite pressure support with strong lockdown, fast offense, and very flexible team value.
kid-buu.overview: Elite pressure support with strong lockdown, fast offense, and very flexible team value.
weaknesses: Damage is not always the main draw.
Needs clean routing for best value.

janemba.name: Janemba
janemba.archetype: Teleporting neutral/anchor character with strong space control, sword normals, and tricky mix.
janemba.overview: Teleporting neutral/anchor character with strong space control, sword normals, and tricky mix.

hit.name: Hit
hit.archetype: Grounded neutral specialist with stance pressure, counters, and strong whiff-punish control.
hit.overview: Grounded neutral specialist with stance pressure, counters, and strong whiff-punish control.

beerus.name: Beerus
beerus.archetype: Orb setplay character with strong space traps, creative pressure, and strong assist-backed offense.
beerus.overview: Orb setplay character with strong space traps, creative pressure, and strong assist-backed offense.

android-16.name: Android 16
android-16.archetype: Command-grab bruiser with huge damage, strong armor ideas, and simple scary offense.
android-16.overview: Command-grab bruiser with huge damage, strong armor ideas, and simple scary offense.

android-17.name: Android 17
android-17.archetype: Mobile pressure character with rekka layers, barrier utility, and strong team flexibility.
android-17.overview: Mobile pressure character with rekka layers, barrier utility, and strong team flexibility.

android-18.name: Android 18
android-18.archetype: Support/mix character built around 17 calls, barrier safety, and elite level 3 positioning.
android-18.overview: Support/mix character built around 17 calls, barrier safety, and elite level 3 positioning.
strengths: One of the best level 3 mix situations because the spacing works from basically anywhere.
Barrier assist protects risky movement and lets rushdown characters force awkward decisions.
17 calls add neutral cover, combo routes, lockdown, and layered pressure.

android-21-majin.name: Android 21 (Majin)
android-21-majin.archetype: Toolbox character with steals, strong neutral, command-grab pressure, and flexible routes.
android-21-majin.overview: Toolbox character with steals, strong neutral, command-grab pressure, and flexible routes.

android-21-lab-coat.name: Android 21 (Lab Coat)
android-21-lab-coat.archetype: Strong all-round rushdown character with debuff threat, barrier utility, and reliable pressure.
android-21-lab-coat.overview: Strong all-round rushdown character with debuff threat, barrier utility, and reliable pressure.
weaknesses: Needs careful routing for best value.

dbz-broly.name: DBZ Broly
dbz-broly.archetype: Armored zoner/grappler with huge screen control, scary grabs, and excellent anchor presence.
dbz-broly.overview: Armored zoner/grappler with huge screen control, scary grabs, and excellent anchor presence.

dbs-broly.name: DBS Broly
dbs-broly.archetype: Strike-throw bruiser with giant reward, meter build, and great DHC value.
dbs-broly.overview: Strike-throw bruiser with giant reward, meter build, and great DHC value.
strengths: Huge damage and meter build, especially through long routes and auto-combo routing.
Level 3 powers him up with damage, armor-break state, and passive ki generation.
Long buttons, armor on key tools, command grabs, and strong strike-throw pressure.
weaknesses: Some neutral tools are committal or predictable.

kefla.name: Kefla
kefla.archetype: Fast rushdown point with strong movement, beam-to-mix ideas, and flexible super routes.
kefla.overview: Fast rushdown point with strong movement, beam-to-mix ideas, and flexible super routes.
weaknesses: Needs assist timing for best mix.
Some routes can drop late in scaling.

jiren.name: Jiren
jiren.archetype: Defensive neutral monster with counters, armor-style answers, and high damage confirms.
jiren.overview: Defensive neutral monster with counters, armor-style answers, and high damage confirms.

ssj4-goku-daima.name: SSj4 Goku (Daima)
ssj4-goku-daima.archetype: Mobile DLC fighter with strong assists, flip/dash pressure, and broad tag synergy.
ssj4-goku-daima.overview: Mobile DLC fighter with strong assists, flip/dash pressure, and broad tag synergy.
